name: recampus
description: Monorepo do ReCampus - Marketplace de Economia Circular Universitaria (raiz apenas com scripts de conveniencia; backend e frontend sao projetos independentes)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
